isi.lyrics:
Lyric sokodomo & Night Tempo - WALKIE TALKIE

Romanization

10-4
I got a notice
Say the code cuz
Love is loud and clear baby
Press the tone
Your voice is like a melody
Oh yeah (Oh yeah)

Don’t need a screen I see you’re clean
Don’t need to text just press baby
What you want and what you need is not a dream

(Oh yeah)
(Oh yeah)
(Oh yeah)

A private connection
Your frequency comes in waves
(walkie talkie walkie talkie)
So, baby
Touch that Button
And just scream it
What you wanna say

WALKIE TALKIE WALK WALK TALKIE

Call me when you want me baby
Call me on my WALKIE TALKIE
Push and play me
When you lonely
Call me on my WALKIE TALKIE
Call me when you want me baby
Call me on my WALKIE TALKIE
Baby, it’s all about
WALKIE TALKIE
WALK WALK TALKIE

Your lingo’s sweet as gold
I
I
I wanna see some more
The wavelengths in the air tonight
So, whisper in my ear
What’s in your mind

A private connection
Your frequency comes in waves
(walkie talkie walkie talkie)
So, baby
Touch that Button
And just scream it
What you wanna say

WALKIE TALKIE
WALK WALK TALKIE

Call me when you want me baby

When you lonely

Call me on my WALKIE TALKIE

WALKIE TALKIE
WALK WALK
